title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
